home.hero_subtitle: Upload your CBP Form 7501 and get an instant itemised refund estimate in minutes.
home.step1_desc: Drag & drop your CBP Form 7501 (PDF, JPEG, or PNG). Encrypted and auto-deleted after 24 hours.
home.step2_desc: Our OCR engine extracts all fields. Review any low-confidence values before calculation.
home.step3_desc: Receive an itemised breakdown with IEEPA refund total and recommended filing pathway.

calculate.privacy_text: We collect your CBP Form 7501 solely to calculate your estimated IEEPA tariff refund. Documents are encrypted with AES-256 and automatically deleted after 24 hours. Your data is never shared with third parties.
calculate.privacy_accept: I accept the Privacy Notice and Terms of Use
calculate.dropzone_title: Drag & Drop your CBP Form 7501 here
calculate.dropzone_hint: Accepts: PDF, JPEG, PNG  ·  Max size: 20 MB
calculate.dropzone_disabled_tip: Please accept the Privacy Notice above to enable upload
calculate.err_unsupported: Only PDF, JPEG or PNG files are accepted.
calculate.err_unrecognised: We couldn't read this document. Please upload a clear CBP Form 7501.
calculate.err_timeout: Processing timed out. Please try again.
calculate.err_rate_limit: Too many uploads. Please wait before trying again.
calculate.err_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

review.title: Review Extracted Fields
review.subtitle: Fields highlighted in amber require your attention — click to edit.

results.title: Estimated IEEPA Refund
results.psc_desc: A Post-Summary Correction can be filed with CBP within 15 days of the entry summary date. This is the simplest and fastest option. Contact a licensed CHB to proceed.
results.protest_desc: A CBP Protest can be filed within 180 days of the entry summary date. This process is more complex but still viable. Contact a licensed customs broker.
results.ineligible_desc: The 180-day deadline for this entry has passed. A refund cannot be claimed at this time.
results.lead_title: Want to file for a refund?
results.lead_desc: Our customs experts can handle the entire PSC / Protest filing process.
results.disclaimer: This estimate is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal or tax advice. Actual refund amounts may differ based on CBP review. Dimerco Express Group assumes no liability for reliance on this estimate. Consult a licensed Customs House Broker (CHB) before filing any claim.
